# iru_blueprint_assignment (Resource)

Assigns a library item to an Iru Blueprint. This is an association resource: it manages one (blueprint, library item[, assignment node]) attachment. Any attribute change forces a new assignment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Attach a library item to a blueprint. For map blueprints with conditional
# logic, also set assignment_node_id.
resource "iru_blueprint_assignment" "core_wifi" {
  blueprint_id    = iru_blueprint.core.id
  library_item_id = iru_custom_profile.wifi.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `blueprint_id` (String) ID of the blueprint.
- `library_item_id` (String) ID of the library item to assign.

### Optional

- `assignment_node_id` (String) Assignment node ID. Required for map blueprints that use conditional logic; must be omitted for classic blueprints.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `blueprint_id:library_item_id[:assignment_node_id]`.
